news.title: Crypto exchange Kraken is trying to become a bank in Europe
ZEC jumps 12% as Zcash nears mathematical proof against hidden counterfeit bugs
news.summary: Project Tachyon outlined new details of its verification effort for Zcash's upcoming Ironwood shielded pool.

news.title: SBI Holdings is sole investor in crypto platform EDX Markets’ $76 million Series C
news.summary: Institutional crypto platform EDX Markets has closed a $76 million Series C funding round, with Japan's SBI Holdings as the sole investor.

news.title: Radar Chat Wants to Make Sending Bitcoin as Easy as Firing Off a Text
news.summary: Built on Signal’s open-source technology, Radar Chat combines encrypted messaging with self-custodial Bitcoin payments via Lightning Network.

news.title: Kenya's Markets Regulator Seeks Blockchain Tool to Track Crypto Crime
news.summary: The Capital Markets Authority wants to monitor over 20 blockchains for fraud, laundering, and sanctions evasion under Kenya's new crypto law.

news.title: Wintermute Cautions 'Relief Rally' Likely as Bitcoin Touches Highest Price in Weeks
news.summary: Market maker Wintermute remains cautious, suggesting that recent Bitcoin action is a relief rally rather than a fundamental market change.

news.title: USDT wins payments, USDC wins DeFi as stablecoins diverge: Dune
news.summary: Dune data shows Tether's USDT has become crypto’s dominant payments stablecoin while Circle's USDC powers DeFi, highlighting how blockchain choice shapes stablecoin use.
